title: Large Number of US Grain Sales to China Continue
section_path: Large Number of US Grain Sales to China Continue
section_path_text: Large Number of US Grain Sales to China Continue
summary:
Main
Recent days have continued to see the United States report new grain sales to China. 26 of the last 31 business days (including all five days last week) have seen grain sales to China reported. This is an extremely impressive feat and we are unaware of any other period where this has occurred.
